headline: TD Cowen Maintains a Buy Rating on Zebra Technologies Corporation (ZBRA) stock with a PT of $400.00
summary: Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ:ZBRA) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On February 17, analyst Joseph C Giordano from TD Cowen maintained a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock with a price objective of $400.00.
